name: backend-inscribing-ceremony
description: a collection of services for the backend of inscribing-ceremony

scripts.start:backend: cd backend-server && npm install && npm run start
scripts.seed:backend: bash -lc "sleep 5 && cd backend-server && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run seed"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:database" "npm run start:socket"
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:database && npm run setup:socket
